Global (All).title: Taiwan says China has carried out largest incursion yet into its air defence zone as tensions escalate
Global (All).summary: China has carried out its largest incursion yet into Taiwan\u2019s air defence zone, with 71 Chinese aircraft entering the zone over the past 24 hours, the country\u2019s military said.

United States.title: Mass Shooting in Highland Park, Illinois
United States.summary: A mass shooting occurred in Highland Park, Illinois, on July 4, 2022, resulting in the deaths of six people.

United States.title: Escalation of Tensions between the US and China over Taiwan
United States.summary: The US has strengthened its military presence in Asia, heightening tensions with China, which claims Taiwan as its own.

United States.title: FBI Raid on Donald Trump's Mar-a-Lago Estate
United States.summary: The FBI conducted a search at former US President Donald Trump's Mar-a-Lago estate, sparking controversy and debate over executive privilege.

South Korea.title: North Korea launches ballistic missiles, sparks concerns in South Korea
South Korea.summary: North Korea has launched multiple ballistic missiles, prompting an emergency meeting of the United Nations Security Council and raising concerns about the potential for military action in South Korea.

South Korea.title: South Korea's president warns of 'grave consequences' over North Korea's nuclear program
South Korea.summary: South Korea's President has warned of 'grave consequences' if North Korea continues to develop its nuclear program, amid concerns about the potential for military conflict.

South Korea.title: Protests erupt in South Korea over labor law reforms
South Korea.summary: Protests have erupted in South Korea over proposed labor law reforms, which opponents argue will weaken workers' rights and undermine the country's social safety net.

Japan.title: Japan PM Fumio Kishida Announces Plans to Reform Country's Retirement System
Japan.summary: Japanese Prime Minister Fumio Kishida has announced plans to reform the country's retirement system, which has been criticized for being overly complex and leading to poverty among the elderly. The reforms aim to simplify the system, increase benefits, and reduce bureaucracy.

Japan.title: North Korea Fires Missile Over Japan, Triggering Air Raid Sirens in Tokyo
Japan.summary: North Korea fired a missile over Japan on August 28, triggering air raid sirens in Tokyo and other major cities. The missile landed in the Pacific Ocean and did not cause any damage or injuries.
